Title: Custom World Generation
Description:
[b]about[/b]
Inspired by world generation settings in Dwarf Fortress. This mod allows you to change the number of locations and game objects that Caves of Qud generates.
At this moment Custom World Generation allows you to change:
- the number of villages (0x, 1x, 2x, 4x)
- the number of lairs (0x, 1x, 2x, 4x)
- Sultan history length (1x, 2x, 4x)
- the number of procedural quests (0x, 1x, 2x, 4x)
You can choose the settings during character creation.
[b]compability[/b]
This mod uses Harmony patches to overwrite world generation functions or inject intermediate language instructions into them.
Functions modified:
[code]
QudHistoryFactory.GenerateVillageEraHistory
JoppaWorldBuilder.BuildLairs
JoppaWorldBuilder.BuildDynamicQuests
QudHistoryFactory.GenerateNewSultan
JoppaWorldBuilder.AddSultanHistoryLocations
QudHistoryFactory.GenerateNewSultanHistory
[/code]
